steps.name: 17 电商主流程-建品到查单

parameters.value: {'id': '17', 'name': '电商主流程-建品到查单', 'enabled': True, 'steps': [{'name': 'step_01_post', 'request': {'method': 'POST', 'path': '/add_product', 'headers': {'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded', 'Accept': 'application/json'}, 'path_params': {}, 'body': {'name': 'case17_flow_main', 'price': '10', 'stock': '5'}}, 'assert': {'status': 201, 'checks': []}, 'extract': {'id': '$.id'}}, {'name': 'step_02_get', 'request': {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/', 'headers': {}, 'path_params': {}}, 'assert': {'status': 200, 'checks': []}}, {'name': 'step_03_get', 'request': {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/order/{product_id}', 'headers': {}, 'path_params': {'product_id': 'STEP:step_01_post.id'}}, 'assert': {'status': 200, 'checks': []}}, {'name': 'step_04_post', 'request': {'method': 'POST', 'path': '/order/{product_id}', 'headers': {'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'}, 'path_params': {'product_id': 'STEP:step_01_post.id'}, 'body': {'quantity': '2'}}, 'assert': {'status': 302, 'checks': []}}, {'name': 'step_05_get', 'request': {'method': 'GET', 'path': '/orders', 'headers': {}, 'path_params': {}}, 'assert': {'status': 200, 'checks': []}}], 'assert': {'status': 200, 'checks': []}, '_mode': 'json'}
